description: Full companion dialogue for Theron the Bold, Adventurer's Guild warrior

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Hail, friend! The Guild spoke highly of your deeds. It seems we've finally met face to face.

choices.text: You must be Theron. Your reputation precedes you.
Are you interested in adventuring together?
Tell me about your combat experience.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Ready for battle, as always. What's on your mind?

choices.text: What do you think of the other guilds?

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Ha! Reputation is a double-edged sword. It draws both allies and challengers. I've earned mine through blood, sweat, and years of service to the Guild. Every scar tells a story.

choices.text: What's the most dangerous creature you've fought?

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Adventure together? Now that's an interesting proposition. Guildmaster Vorn has given me leave to seek worthy companions. You've proven yourself capable through the trials. I would be honored to fight at your side.

choices.text: Then join me. Let's make legends together.
I need to think about it.
What about Sylva? Is she also available?

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Excellent! My sword and shield are yours. Together, we'll carve our names into history! Lead on, and know that Theron the Bold stands with you.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Ah, Sylva Swiftfoot. A fine archer and tracker. The Guild can only spare one champion to accompany you, I'm afraid. You'll need to choose between us. My strength is in direct combat - holding the line and protecting allies. Sylva excels at range and support.

choices.text: I could use a strong shield at my side. I choose you.
I need to think about this choice.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Take your time. A warrior should choose their companions wisely. I'll be here when you've made your decision.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Twenty years of battle have taught me much. I've fought goblins, bandits, ogres, and worse. The key to survival is not just strength, but knowing when to attack and when to defend. A shield isn't just for blocking - it's a weapon of its own.

choices.text: What abilities do you bring to a fight?

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: My Shield Bash can stun enemies, giving you openings. Battle Cry inspires allies to fight harder. And when things get dire, my Taunt forces enemies to focus on me. I'm built to take punishment so others don't have to.

choices.text: That sounds perfect for my party.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: A troll beneath Millbrook Bridge. Took three of us to bring it down, and two didn't walk away. I carry their memory with every battle. It's why I fight - so their sacrifice wasn't in vain.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Thank you. They died with honor, protecting a village that couldn't protect itself. The Guild gave them a warrior's farewell. It's what we all hope for, in the end.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Aye, it is. We accept that risk when we take the oath. But it doesn't make the losses easier. It makes us fight smarter, protect each other better.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Fighting fit and eager for the next challenge! My sword arm grows stronger with each battle. You've led us through much already. I have no regrets following you.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Nothing that won't heal! A warrior's body is covered in scars. Each one is a lesson learned. The day I stop earning new scars is the day I grow complacent - and that's when death finds you.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: I was born in a small village near the Elder Moor. Raiders took everything when I was young - my home, my family's livelihood, nearly my life. A passing Guild adventurer saved what remained. From that day, I knew my calling.

choices.text: Did you ever find those raiders?

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: My father died defending our home. Mother survived but never recovered from the shock. She passed a few winters later. My sister married a merchant and moved to Larton. We exchange letters when we can. She worries, but she understands.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Years later, I tracked down their leader. He'd become a petty warlord in the borderlands. I challenged him to single combat and took his head. It didn't bring my father back, but it gave me closure. And saved others from the same fate.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: It did. Guildmaster Vorn saw potential in an angry young man and tempered my rage into discipline. The other members became brothers and sisters in arms. When you fight beside someone, trust them with your life... bonds form that blood alone cannot create.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: You want my honest opinion on the other powers in this land? Very well.

choices.text: What do you think of the Thieves Guild?

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Thieves. Rogues who prey on honest folk. I know some see them as a necessary evil, maintaining order among criminals. But I've seen too many victims of their 'business.' Still, in my experience, even a thief can find honor if given the chance.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Disciplined. Professional. The Iron Company are warriors I respect, even if we sometimes compete for contracts. Captain Steele runs a tight ship. They fight for coin, but they honor their contracts absolutely. In battle, I'd rather have them at my side than against me.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Wizards make me nervous, I won't lie. Too much power in the hands of too few. But Archmage Elara has proven the Circle's worth many times over. Magic is a tool, like any weapon. It's the wielder's intent that matters.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: When we enter combat, I'll move to the front. Let me draw their attention with Taunt while you flank. If you see me raise my shield high, that means I'm about to use Battle Cry - that's your signal to press the attack.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: If numbers turn against us, fall back and let me hold the chokepoint. My shield can take punishment that would fell lesser warriors. Buy time, regroup, then counterattack when they've exhausted themselves on my defense.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Use me as cover when you need to, but don't stay static. I'm the anvil - you're the hammer. Flank them, strike from angles they don't expect. When they turn to face you, I'll punish them for it.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Understood. I'll hold this position until you return. Be careful out there - I won't be at your back.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: I've waited long enough. A warrior grows restless standing idle. Are we moving, or shall I find my own adventure?

choices.text: Sorry for the delay. Follow me.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Finally! Let's go find something worthy of our steel.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Very well. But know that patience is not among my virtues. My sword arm itches for action.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: May your blade stay sharp and your shield hold true. Until we meet again.

nodes.speaker: Theron
nodes.text: Lead on. My sword is ready.

combat_start: Come test your steel against mine!
combat_kill: Is that the best you've got?
player_low_health: Don't you dare die on me!
ambient_dungeon: Stay alert. Danger lurks in these shadows.
I've seen places like this before. Stay close.
The air here reeks of death. Be ready.
ambient_town: I could use a good ale after this.
Even in peace, a warrior must stay prepared.
ambient_wilderness: Nature can be as dangerous as any dungeon.
Keep your eyes open. Bandits love these roads.
Beautiful country. Shame about the monsters.
